title: կիլո
new_etymology: Borrowed from French kilo, from Greek χίλιοι (khílioi, “thousand”).

title: կինճ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: կիսել
definition: to halve, to divide, to share, to split.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կիսեմ (kisem, “to halve, to divide”).

title: կիվի
new_etymology: Borrowed from English kiwi, from Maori kiwi (“kiwi”).

title: կծել
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կծեմ (kcem, “to bite, to sting”).

title: կնձնի
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: կնքել
definition: to seal, to affix a seal, to confirm.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կնքեմ (knkʿem, “to seal, to confirm”).

title: կոլա
new_etymology: Borrowed from English cola, brand name Coca-Cola.

title: կոխել
definition: to trample, to tread, to insert.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կոխեմ (koxem, “to trample, to tread”).

title: կոմոդ
new_etymology: Borrowed from French commode (“chest of drawers”).

title: կռուփ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: կտուց
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly a borrowing from Turkish gaguz (“beak”).

title: կրել
definition: to carry, to transport, to bear.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կրեմ (krem, “to carry, to bear”).

title: կցել
definition: to join, to unite, to attach, to annex.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian կցեմ (kcʿem, “to join, to attach”).

title: հազել
definition: to immolate, to sacrifice to idols.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian հազեմ (hazem, “to sacrifice, to offer up”).

title: հալավ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: համք
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: հանել
definition: to pull out, to extract, to remove.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian հանեմ (hanem, “to take out, to remove”).

title: հաչել
new_etymology: Of imitative origin; compare with similar sounds in other languages.

title: հեն
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: հենց
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: հեռել
definition: to set, to mount, to enchase, to fit in.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian հեռեմ (herem, “to set, to fit in”).

title: հիրել
definition: to join together, to stretch out.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian հիրեմ (hirem, “to join, to stretch out”).

title: հոգալ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian հոգեմ (hogem, “to care for, to worry”).
